name: Distances
overview: Mohsen Karimi (Daniyal Hakimi), who is a religious person, notices the differences and distance between his views and his son Saeed (Shahrokh Astakhri). Some time later, Saeed is present in an accident with an unknown girl and her friend Sasan (Nima Shaher Khashahi). This issue increases the differences between father and son. At the same time, Saeed's father meets Leila Mushir (Fateme Gudarzi), who was previously engaged, and tries to solve her life problems.

trailers.title: نیما شاهرخ شاهی و بهاره افشاری در سریال فاصله ها - قسمت 1 | Serial Faseleha - Part 1
